title: ffi: background task panic silently hangs client_next_event forever
description: client_connect spawns a tokio::spawn task (client.rs:119) that bridges transport events to the NieEvent channel. If this task panics (e.g., due to a bug in map_notification), the task silently exits without closing event_tx. The mpsc channel stays open — event_tx is moved into the task and is dropped on panic, but tokio::spawn catches panics so the drop may not happen cleanly. Result: event_rx stays open with no sender, client_next_event hangs forever on recv(). Dart's isolate blocks permanently with no timeout. Fix: wrap the task body in panic::catch_unwind or explicitly drop event_tx on any exit path.
